message:
test(conformance): add MIGRATE and transaction edge case tests

Add 28 new conformance test cases:
- 15 WATCH/UNWATCH edge cases (watch nonexistent keys, unwatch state,
  multiple keys, watch inside multi, exec after syntax error)
- 13 MIGRATE option tests (port validation, COPY/REPLACE, AUTH/AUTH2,
  KEYS variations, duplicate options)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
